name: Viatris Inc
business: Viatris is a global healthcare company that supplies high-quality medicines, including generics, iconic brands, and innovative medicines, to approximately 1 billion patients annually across more than 165 countries.

exposures.sentence: The Company is working on many other programs, including patent-protected, innovative assets such as selatogrel and cenerimod
Significant products sold by the Developed Markets segment include ... EpiPen Auto-Injector.
Viatris has numerous branded drugs, including iconic brands, as well as several global key brands to help patients manage their health.

catalysts.event: FDA target action date for low dose estrogen weekly dermal patch
catalysts.sentence: The Company's NDA was accepted under the FDA's 505(b)(2) regulatory pathway, and the FDA has assigned a target action date of July 30, 2026.

catalysts.event: Launch of Inpefa (sotagliflozin) in United Arab Emirates
catalysts.sentence: The Company received the first approval for Inpefa (sotagliflozin) in the United Arab Emirates, and the product was launched in early 2026.

catalysts.event: Anticipated FDA action for phentolamine ophthalmic solution (MR-141) for presbyopia
catalysts.sentence: The supplemental NDA was accepted for review by the FDA in February 2026 and the Company anticipates FDA action during the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Resumption of manufacturing at Nashik facility
catalysts.sentence: Manufacturing at the facility has been temporarily suspended and the Company currently expects to resume operations beginning in April 2026.

catalysts.event: FDA reinspection readiness of Indore facility
catalysts.sentence: The facility will be subject to a reinspection by the FDA. The timing of the reinspection will be determined by the FDA; however, we anticipate that the facility will be ready for reinspection in 2026.

catalysts.event: Expiration of non-compete restrictions for U.S. markets
catalysts.sentence: These restrictions expired immediately at the time of close for all ex-U.S. markets and will expire in November 2026 for U.S. markets.
